title: SY8 4BD, Freemans of Newent Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/CP3434JF/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Freemans of Newent Limited   Installation name: Dugdale Poultry Farm   Permit number: EPR/CP3434JF/V003   "
